title: tordylium cordatum subsp. trachycarpum
intro: Tordylium cordatum subsp. trachycarpum, also known as the Mediterranean meadow rue, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and polyphenolic compounds. The health benefits of Tordylium cordatum subsp. trachycarpum include its ability to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral activities. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
